# Antigravity Extension Gate MCP

Paid remote MCP for Antigravity extension compatibility MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://antigravityextensiongate.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://antigravityextensiongate.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://antigravityextensiongate.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/antigravity-extension-gate-mcp

Use case: Antigravity extension compatibility MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_extension_gate, classify_extension_gap, issue_extension_receipt, suggest_extension_fix, export_extension_audit
